subprocess_flow.description: The AI Specialist selects the appropriate AI model architecture based on the nature of the prepared dataset and the desired outcomes. This involves evaluating various algorithms, such as neural networks, decision trees, or support vector machines, considering factors like data dimensionality, complexity, and interpretability. The selection process also includes defining the model's hyperparameters and configuration settings to optimize its performance for the specific task.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To choose the most suitable AI model for the given task.
end_conditions: AI model architecture selected and configured

step_risks_and_controls.control: Conduct thorough model evaluation and comparison.

subprocess_flow.description: The AI Specialist trains the selected AI model using the prepared dataset. This involves feeding the dataset into the model and iteratively adjusting the model's parameters to minimize the difference between its predictions and the actual values. The training process includes techniques like gradient descent, backpropagation, and optimization algorithms to improve the model's accuracy and generalization ability. Regular monitoring of the model's performance during training helps to identify and address issues like overfitting or underfitting.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To develop an accurate and reliable AI model.
triggers: AI model architecture selected and configured
end_conditions: AI model trained and performance metrics generated

step_risks_and_controls.control: Implement data anonymization and pseudonymization techniques. Ensure compliance with GDPR and other relevant data privacy regulations.

subprocess_flow.description: The AI Specialist validates the trained AI model using a separate validation dataset to assess its generalization ability and prevent overfitting. This involves evaluating the model's performance on unseen data and comparing it to the training performance. Validation metrics like accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score are used to quantify the model's performance. The validation process also includes techniques like cross-validation and hyperparameter tuning to optimize the model's performance and ensure its reliability.
success_criteria: Model validated with acceptable performance metrics
Model generalizes well to unseen data
subprocess_flow.purpose: To ensure the AI model is accurate and reliable.
triggers: AI model trained and performance metrics generated
end_conditions: AI model validated and validation report generated

step_risks_and_controls.control: Ensure validation data is representative of real-world data.
